_meta.purpose: CAU NOI giua taxonomy moi (category/subcategory) va he thong cu (conflict catalog 225 muc + cay conflict 93 case + 5 ngach cu).
cach_dung: 1. Engine chon page -> category -> subcategory (file 1 + file 2).
2. Tra file nay lay compatible_conflict_tags cua subcategory.
3. Loc conflict catalog cu (225 muc) theo tag -> duoc tap conflict ung vien.
4. Ap hard compatibility + cooldown + daily cap -> eligible set.
5. Weighted random trong eligible set (cong trong so affinity).
6. Neu eligible set rong -> fallback: chon conflict least-used trong category, KHONG de null, KHONG de Claude tu phat minh.
_meta.legacy_note: 5 ngach cu KHONG map 1-1 sang category. Moi subcategory chi mang TOI DA 1 legacy_theme (hero archetype chi phoi). Sub thuoc mang moi de RONG - engine KHONG duoc suy nguoc de gan theme. E_ngheo_vs_giau la truong status_dynamic rieng, ap xuyen category, KHONG dung de loc conflict.
_meta.conflict_filter_rule: Loc conflict theo conflict_ids/fallback_tags cua SUBCATEGORY truoc. legacy_theme chi dung de loc THEM trong tap do neu con du candidate. Neu subcategory khong co legacy_theme -> khong loc theo theme, chi dung tag.
_meta.derivation_note: Bang nay SUY RA tu data thuc te (theme cua tung subcategory), khong phai gan tay. Engine CHI dung bang nay de kiem tra hop le, TUYET DOI khong dung de SUY NGUOC gan theme cho subcategory de rong. Subcategory de rong legacy_theme => khong loc conflict theo theme, chi loc theo tag/conflict_ids.
_meta.theme_definition: legacy_theme = AI LA TRUNG TAM XUNG DOT (hero archetype), khong phai 'bai co nguoi gia'. A_me_gia chi dung khi nguoi gia BI CHINH CON/CHAU bac dai la truc chinh. Xung dot anh chi em -> F_anh_chi_em. Nguoi ngoai thay gia dinh -> G_cong_dong. Trung tam khac (thu cung, tien huu, cong so, bi mat) -> de RONG.

legacy_themes.A_me_gia: Me gia - con bac beo (hero_archetype: elderly parent)
legacy_themes.C_co_dau: Co dau moi - nha chong (hero_archetype: new bride/in-law outsider)
legacy_themes.D_vo_phan_boi: Vo bi phan boi (hero_archetype: betrayed spouse)
legacy_themes.E_ngheo_vs_giau: KHONG phai category. Chuyen thanh status_dynamic/class_tension, ap xuyen nhieu category.

legacy_theme_to_categories.E_ngheo_vs_giau: KHONG phai legacy_theme - da chuyen thanh truong status_dynamic rieng
